name: Pescado Con Agristada
recipeIngredient: Juice of 1/2 medium lemon (reserve the other half for the sauce)
2 pounds Skinless fish filets, such as halibut, salmon, flounder, cod, striped bass, sea trout, etc., cut into serving-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
------------
For the sauce:
1. Beat 2 large eggs in a medium bowl.
2. In a small bowl, mix 1 tablespoon Matzoh cake meal and 3 tablespoons water to make a creamy paste.
3. Stir the paste into the egg-lemon mixture.
4. Gradually stir in about 1/2 cup of hot fish broth.
5. Stirring constantly, add all the egg-lemon mixture back into the hot fish broth over low heat until the sauce has thickened. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
For poaching:
1. To poach the fish, combine water, lemon juice, parsley, salt, and pepper in a large deep skillet.
2. Add the fish fillets in one layer if possible.
3. Bring the liquid to a boil, then lower the heat and cover the skillet.
4. Simmer the fish for 5-10 minutes, or until it is just cooked through but not falling apart (if the fillets are thick, carefully turn them once during poaching).
5. Use a slotted spoon to transfer the fish to a serving dish. Reserve the broth.
6. Pour the sauce over the fish and serve hot or refrigerate and serve chilled.
